/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++  -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -ffast-math -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -ffast-math -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -fno-threadsafe-statics -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T "/home/carol_nasser/EcoDrive/platform/stm32f4/STM32F401XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=EcoDrive.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/application/elmotor_pmsm.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/application/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/application/sensor.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/application/sys.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/middleware/aebfStream.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/eldriver/eldriver_core.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/eldriver/eldriver_hall.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/eldriver/eldriver_mc3p.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/eldriver/eldriver_mc3p_it.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/eldriver/eldriver_uart.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/eldriver/eldriver_usbcdc.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/startup_stm32f401xc.s.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/system_stm32f4xx.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/stm32f4xx_it.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/platform.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/sysmem.c.obj CMakeFiles/EcoDrive.dir/platform/stm32f4/syscalls.c.obj -o /home/carol_nasser/EcoDrive/build/bin/EcoDrive.elf  /home/carol_nasser/EcoDrive/build/lib/libstm32f4_platform.a -lm /home/carol_nasser/EcoDrive/build/lib/libCMSISDSP.a
